title: shieldcooldown
description: a mod that adds a cooldown bar above ur shield in hotbar
body:
a mod that adds a cooldown above ur shield in hotbar 
doesnt work with shield status mod for some reason 


```
doesnt work with any mod that changes the shield such as sheield status (and its addons) 
but works with any resource pack that changes the shield 
```


### 
### **why use that and not shield fixes??** 

1. **it was made because some people like the cooldown bar instead of what shield fixes offer so it just depends on your use!**
